case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING vs. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: SEE TEXT, NORTHERLY PORTION OF THE BLOCK BOUNDED BY FOLSOM, MAIN AND HARRISON STREETS IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SEE EXHIBIT "A".
